meanings.definition: people collectively who are mentally retarded
examples: he started a school for the retarded

meanings.definition: cause to move more slowly or operate at a slower rate
examples: This drug will retard your heart rate

meanings.definition: slow the growth or development of
examples: The brain damage will retard the child's language development

meanings.definition: relatively slow in mental or emotional or physical development
examples: providing a secure and sometimes happy life for the retarded
